title: Metrics
excerpt: description: View request and performance metrics for your Pages Functions. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Functions metrics can help you diagnose issues and understand your workloads by showing performance and usage data for your Functions. Functions metrics aggregate request data for an individual Pages project. To view your Functions metrics:
